data.description: OVO offers 2 payment types, which are One-Time Payment and Recurring Payment. For both payment types, tokenization must be completed first before transactions can be executed.

Payment </div></h3><p class="has-[.button,input]:flex has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:gap-2 has-[.button,input]:items-center decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl w-full print:break-inside-avoid text-start self-start justify-start">After customer's account is bind/linked and customer has enough balance for payment, merchant can send payment request from customer to DOKU. </p><p class="has-[.button,input]:flex has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:gap-2 has-[.button,input]:items-center decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl w-full print:break-inside-avoid text-start self-start justify-start"></p><h4 id="one-time-payment" class="text-base @xs:text-lg @lg:text-xl font-semibold heading pdf-heading flex items-baseline scroll-mt-(--content-scroll-margin) text-start self-start justify-start relative group/hash decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl w-full print:break-inside-avoid column-first-of-type:pt-0 pt-[0.5em]" data-pdf-heading="true"><div class="relative hash grid grid-area-1-1 h-[1em] border-0 opacity-0 site-background rounded group-hover/hash:opacity-[0] group-focus/hash:opacity-[0] md:group-hover/hash:opacity-[1] md:group-focus/hash:opacity-[1] -ml-6 pr-2 [.flip-heading-hash_&]:order-last [.flip-heading-hash_&]:ml-1 [.flip-heading-hash_&]:pl-2"><a class="inline-flex h-full items-start leading-snug" aria-label="Direct link to heading" href="#one-time-payment"><svg class="gb-icon self-center transition-colors text-transparent group-hover/hash:text-tint-subtle contrast-more:group-hover/hash:text-tint-strong size-4"><title>hashtag</title><defs><mask id="_R_19d39bsnqj6iv5ubsnpfivb_" style="mask-type:alpha"><image data-testid="mask-image" href="https://ka-p.fontawesome.com/releases/v7.2.0/svgs/regular/hashtag.svg?v=2&token=a463935e93" width="100%" height="100%" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"></image></mask></defs><rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="currentColor" mask="url(#_R_19d39bsnqj6iv5ubsnpfivb_)"></rect></svg></a></div><div class="flex-1 z-1 justify-self-start max-w-full break-words text-start self-start justify-start leading-snug">One Time Payment</div></h4><p class="has-[.button,input]:flex has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:gap-2 has-[.button,input]:items-center decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl w-full print:break-inside-avoid text-start self-start justify-start">For One-Time Payments, each transaction must be verified by the customer by entering an OTP and PIN. To enable this flow, merchants are required to include the parameter <code class="py-px px-1.5 min-w-6.5 justify-center items-center ring-1 ring-inset ring-tint bg-tint rounded-sm text-[.875em] leading-[calc(max(1.20em,1.25rem))] break-words hyphens-none">paymentType: "SALE"</code> in the payment request body.</p><p class="has-[.button,input]:flex has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:gap-2 has-[.button,input]:items-center decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl w-full print:break-inside-avoid text-start self-start justify-start">In response, the merchant will receive a <code class="py-px px-1.5 min-w-6.5 justify-center items-center ring-1 ring-inset ring-tint bg-tint rounded-sm text-[.875em] leading-[calc(max(1.20em,1.25rem))] break-words hyphens-none">webRedirectUrl</code>, which should be used to redirect the customer to complete the payment by entering their OTP and PIN. Once the payment process is completed, the merchant will receive a payment notification confirming the transaction status.</p><h4 id="recurring-payment" class="text-base @xs:text-lg @lg:text-xl font-semibold heading pdf-heading flex items-baseline scroll-mt-(--content-scroll-margin) text-start self-start justify-start relative group/hash decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl w-full print:break-inside-avoid column-first-of-type:pt-0 pt-[0.5em]" data-pdf-heading="true"><div class="relative hash grid grid-area-1-1 h-[1em] border-0 opacity-0 site-background rounded group-hover/hash:opacity-[0] group-focus/hash:opacity-[0] md:group-hover/hash:opacity-[1] md:group-focus/hash:opacity-[1] -ml-6 pr-2 [.flip-heading-hash_&]:order-last [.flip-heading-hash_&]:ml-1 [.flip-heading-hash_&]:pl-2"><a class="inline-flex h-full items-start leading-snug" aria-label="Direct link to heading" href="#recurring-payment"><svg class="gb-icon self-center transition-colors text-transparent group-hover/hash:text-tint-subtle contrast-more:group-hover/hash:text-tint-strong size-4"><title>hashtag</title><defs><mask id="_R_1a539bsnqj6iv5ubsnpfivb_" style="mask-type:alpha"><image data-testid="mask-image" href="https://ka-p.fontawesome.com/releases/v7.2.0/svgs/regular/hashtag.svg?v=2&token=a463935e93" width="100%" height="100%" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"></image></mask></defs><rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="currentColor" mask="url(#_R_1a539bsnqj6iv5ubsnpfivb_)"></rect></svg></a></div><div class="flex-1 z-1 justify-self-start max-w-full break-words text-start self-start justify-start leading-snug">Recurring Payment</div></h4><p class="has-[.button,input]:flex has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:gap-2 has-[.button,input]:items-center decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl w-full print:break-inside-avoid text-start self-start justify-start">For OVO Recurring, payments are processed on a scheduled basis. Therefore, OTP and PIN verification is not required for every transaction. Customers only need to complete the verification once during the account binding process, which grants the merchant authorization to execute subsequent scheduled payments.</p><p class="has-[.button,input]:flex has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:gap-2 has-[.button,input]:items-center decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl w-full print:break-inside-avoid text-start self-start justify-start">To initiate this flow, merchants are required to include the parameter <code class="py-px px-1.5 min-w-6.5 justify-center items-center ring-1 ring-inset ring-tint bg-tint rounded-sm text-[.875em] leading-[calc(max(1.20em,1.25rem))] break-words hyphens-none">paymentType: "RECURRING"</code> in the payment request body. In this scheme, the merchant will not receive a <code class="py-px px-1.5 min-w-6.5 justify-center items-center ring-1 ring-inset ring-tint bg-tint rounded-sm text-[.875em] leading-[calc(max(1.20em,1.25rem))] break-words hyphens-none">webRedirectUrl</code>, as no customer redirection is needed. The payment request will be processed directly by the acquirer, and the merchant will receive a notification with the transaction result.</p><p class="has-[.button,input]:flex has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:gap-2 has-[.button,input]:items-center decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl w-full print:break-inside-avoid text-start self-start justify-start"></p><p class="has-[.button,input]:flex has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:gap-2 has-[.button,input]:items-center decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl w-full print:break-inside-avoid text-start self-start justify-start"><strong class="font-bold">Payment Flow</strong></p><div class="decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl layout-wide:max-w-6xl mx-auto print:break-inside-avoid flex w-full metadata.description: OVO offers 2 payment types, which are One-Time Payment and Recurring Payment. For both payment types, tokenization must be completed first before transactions can be executed.
